title: U.S Department of Energy National Laboratories
description: The Department of Energy’s 17 National Laboratories are powerhouse institutions that have led scientific innovation in the United States for more than 70 years.
text: The Department of Energy’s 17 National Laboratories are powerhouse institutions that have led scientific innovation in the United States for more than 70 years. They possess unique instruments and facilities – many of which are found nowhere else in the world – and tackle the critical scientific challenges of our time, from combating climate change to discovering the origins of our universe
